ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., robotic arm, autonomous vehicle) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor is due for calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuators" (
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuator */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the actuator belongs to */,
  "actuator_type" TEXT /* Type of actuator (e.g., motor, piston) */,
  "actuator_name" TEXT /* Name of the actuator */,
  "max_load" REAL /* Maximum load the actuator can handle */,
  "operating_voltage" REAL /* Operating voltage of the actuator */,
  "operating_current" REAL /* Operating current of the actuator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actuator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuators_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servos" (
  "servo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each servo */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the servo belongs to */,
  "servo_type" TEXT /* Type of servo (e.g., positional, rotational) */,
  "servo_name" TEXT /* Name of the servo */,
  "max_angle" REAL /* Maximum angle the servo can rotate */,
  "min_angle" REAL /* Minimum angle the servo can rotate */,
  "operating_voltage" REAL /* Operating voltage of the servo */,
  "operating_current" REAL /* Operating current of the servo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("servo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servos_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system status */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the status belongs to */,
  "status_flag" TEXT /* Status flag (e.g., armed, disarmed) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "last_changed_by" TEXT /* User who last changed the status */,
  "last_changed_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor when the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuator_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actuator the command belongs to */,
  "command_value" REAL /* Value of the command */,
  "command_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the command */,
  "command_status" TEXT /* Status of the actuator command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuator_commands_actuator_id FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_id") REFERENCES actuators ("actuator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servo_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "servo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the servo the position belongs to */,
  "position_value" REAL /* Value of the position */,
  "position_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the position */,
  "servo_status" TEXT /* Status of the servo when the position was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servo_positions_servo_id FOREIGN KEY ("servo_id") REFERENCES servos ("servo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the alarm belongs to */,
  "alarm_flag" TEXT /* Alarm flag (e.g., low battery, high temperature) */,
  "alarm_description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alarm */,
  "last_acked_by" TEXT /* User who last acknowledged the alarm */,
  "last_acked_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last acknowledgment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "login_status" TEXT /* Status of the login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the permission */,
  "created_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alarm the history belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alarm */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alarm */,
  "resolved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_history_alarm_id FOREIGN KEY ("alarm_id") REFERENCES alarms ("alarm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system status the history belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the system status */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who changed the system status */,
  "changed_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES system_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_config_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuator_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actuator the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuator_config_actuator_id FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_id") REFERENCES actuators ("actuator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servo_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "servo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the servo the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servo_config_servo_id FOREIGN KEY ("servo_id") REFERENCES servos ("servo_id")
)
